title: Theta (disambiguation)
content:
'''Theta''' was perhaps a letter of the [[Tionese/Legends|Tionese alphabet]] and could refer to the following:

*[[Theta-class AT-AT barge|''Theta''-class AT-AT barge]]
*[[Theta-class T-1 vessel|''Theta''-class T-1 vessel]]
*[[Theta-class T-2c shuttle/Legends|''Theta''-class T-2c shuttle]]
*[[Theta Squad]]
*[[Theta Squadron]]
*[[Theta Squadron (TIE/sa)]]
